sidebar.deleteSessionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete session "{{label}}"?

gateway.notRunningDesc: The OpenClaw Gateway needs to be running to use this feature. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings.

gatewayImpact.titleRestart: This action will restart the Gateway
gatewayImpact.titleRefresh: This action will refresh the Gateway
gatewayImpact.messageRestartWithChanges: If you continue, ClawX will apply this change and restart the OpenClaw Gateway. Ongoing chats, channel connections, or scheduled tasks may be briefly interrupted.
gatewayImpact.messageRestartOnly: If you continue, ClawX will restart the OpenClaw Gateway. Ongoing chats, channel connections, or scheduled tasks may be briefly interrupted.
gatewayImpact.messageRefreshWithChanges: If you continue, ClawX will apply this change and refresh the OpenClaw Gateway configuration. On some platforms or when in-place reload is unavailable, the Gateway may restart instead.
gatewayImpact.messageRefreshOnly: If you continue, ClawX will refresh the OpenClaw Gateway configuration. On some platforms or when in-place reload is unavailable, the Gateway may restart instead.
